name: showLessonReview
description: Show a presentation-style list of specific topics worth revisiting from previous learning history. This is informational and must not create an additional review or reinforcement loop.

parameters.description: Short heading such as Topics to revisit or Useful foundations for today.
One to six specific topics supported by the supplied learning history, knowledge gaps, or practice recommendations. Put each topic on a separate line. Never invent prior difficulties.
